form.formComment: Having third race start. When well in the market at debut, 2nd in a small field at Wolverhampton on March 9 over 1400m, 6 len behind Crown Relic carrying 57kg at $4.20. Last start 3rd of 11 at Southwell All Weather on March 26 over 1600m, 12 len behind Crest Of Fire with 56.5kg at $4.30. Going well and is among the chances.

formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2). Having third race start. form.formComment: Second-up. First start ran last in a small field at Salisbury on July 12 over 1400m, 18 len behind A Bit Of Spirit with 59kg at $9. Returned from break 3rd in a small field at Chelmsford on March 7 over 1400m, 2.75 len behind Beagle Bay carrying 57kg at $3.30. Should hold the form and makes appeal.
